title: solanum nigrum f. paludosum
intro: Solanum nigrum f. paludosum, also known as black nightshade water or water nightshade, is a variant of the Solanum nigrum plant species, a type of flowering plant in the nightshade family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting immune function, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Herbal preparations of Solanum nigrum f. paludosum typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and stems, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
